narrative:
Ottawa County has 29,679 registered voters, with 51.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 29.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 19.4%, a clear Republican lean of 10.1 percentage points. Baby Boomers are the largest generational cohort at 36.8% of registrants.
